cancelDeletion.cancelledDescription: The workspace deletion has been aborted and the workspace is accessible again.
cancelDeletion.failedDescription: The token is invalid, expired, or the grace period has ended.
cancelDeletion.title: Cancel deletion

deletion.cancelLink: You receive an email with a 7-day cancel link.
deletion.cascade: After the grace period: agents, executions, costs, and members are deleted. Audit history is retained as a 90-day tombstone.
deletion.confirmIntro: This will start a 7-day grace period. After that, all agents, executions, audit history, costs, and members are permanently deleted. You will receive a cancel link by email valid for 7 days.
deletion.description: Permanently remove this workspace and all of its data.
deletion.pendingDescription: This workspace is scheduled for deletion at {date}. Use the cancel link emailed to the owner to abort the deletion before the grace period ends.
deletion.title: Delete workspace

dpa.detailDescription: Active Data Processing Agreement and Article 28 evidence for this tenant.
dpa.history: {count, plural, one {# historical version preserved.} other {# historical versions preserved.}}
dpa.hubDescription: Per-tenant DPA management. Select a tenant from the tenants admin page to upload or view its DPA.
dpa.hubLead: DPA management is scoped per-tenant. Open a tenant detail page to upload, replace, or download its DPA, or use the navigation below.
dpa.noDpa: No DPA uploaded yet. Default tenants use the standard clickwrap DPA.
dpa.uploadIntro: PDF up to 50 MB. The file is virus-scanned, hashed, and stored encrypted in Vault.

email.exportReadyBody: Your workspace data export is ready. Download the archive within 7 days using the link below.
email.tenantExportReadySubject: Your tenant data export is ready

export.cardLead: Download a complete archive of this workspace. The archive is a ZIP file with structured JSON files per resource type and is available for 7 days from a signed URL delivered by email.
export.description: Request a full archive of your workspace data.
export.noJobs: No export jobs yet. Click "Request export" to start one.
export.title: Workspace data export

tenantDeletion.cascadeDescription: Phase 2 cascades workspaces, users, agents, executions, audit chain (cold storage retained 7 years), Vault paths, DNS records, TLS certs, and OAuth callbacks. The tenant admin can recover during the grace period only.
tenantDeletion.description: Two-phase cascade with 30-day grace, 2PA-gated and subscription-preflight enforced.
tenantDeletion.finalExport: Generate final tenant export before cascade
tenantDeletion.title: Tenant deletion
tenantDeletion.twoPaPlaceholder: Paste the consume_token from your 2PA challenge

tenantExport.description: Generate a password-protected ZIP of all data owned by this tenant.
tenantExport.lead: Generate a password-protected ZIP containing all workspaces, users, and audit chain entries for this tenant. The download password is delivered to the tenant admin out-of-band.
tenantExport.passwordNote: The password will be delivered to the tenant admin separately. The download URL stays valid for 7 days.
tenantExport.title: Tenant data export
